message:
fix(cleanup,storage,messaging): escape glob base paths, parse batch commit messages, account for inline attachment size

- cleanup: escape base path before joining with glob pattern in
  collect_matching_paths to prevent directories containing glob-special
  characters ([, ], *, ?) from being misinterpreted as glob syntax
- storage(get_communication_graph): iterate over all lines of a commit
  message (not just the subject) when extracting "mail:" entries, so
  batch commits that list multiple mail operations in the body are
  correctly reflected in the communication graph
- storage(get_timeline_commits): recognize "batch: " subject prefix as
  a distinct timeline event type
- messaging: include "inline" attachments (not just "file") in the
  total message size check and apply a ~33% base64 encoding overhead
  factor for inline payloads to avoid under-counting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
